title: ZOFUN 5M Long Stainless Steel Chains for Fence Gates, Galvanized Metal Chain 3mm, Heavy Duty Steel Chains, Anti-Theft Silver Chain Link Fencing for Fence Gates Garage Doors and Bicycle Security Locks
features: 5 M Chain -In the package you will receive a 5 meters long stainless steel chain, which have a thickness of 3 mm, such a length can meet most needs of your daily life.
Stainless Steel -ZOFUN link chain is made of high grade 304 stainless steel in solid structure, flexible to use and not easy to break so that can sevice a long time.
Welded Connection -Each closed parts of each link of the heavy duty chain is fully welded, and the interface is sturdy, avoiding the main stress points, provide a safe use.
Galvanized Treatment -The gate chain adopt a polishing treatment, enhance the rust and corrosion resistance, offer a better use for outdoor use.

Wide Application -Our solid coil chain are multipurpose so that can be used to lock your gates, hanging your plant in your gardon, drying your cloths in your balcony and so on More uses are waiting for you to discover!
description: ZOFUN 5 M Stainless Steel Chain Our heavy duty chain, series of links, made of stainless steel, joined together to form a flexible connector for various purposes, can be used for such as holding, pulling, hoisting, hauling, conveying, and transmitting power. Features - Our stainless steel chain is well-made with a stable and solid structure, exhibits high strength, rigidity, and good heat/cold resistance. - Our heavy duty chains can be used for towing a boat, hanging a plant, hanging a swing, weightlifting, safety chains, supporting a hammock, securing on a pontoon, as an engine tether, etc. - The line chain is also perfect for the anti-theft chain, pet chain, closet door, clothes hanging chain, birdhouse, plant, guardrail, boxing punching bag, swing chain, towing, pipe hanging, stump pulling, load securement, and so on. - Adopt a polishing treatment, our security chain provide a better rust & corrosion resistance and longer service time. Specifications - Material:Stainless Steel - Color:Silver - Connection:Welded - Size:Approx. - Length:5 M/16.4Ft. - Thickness:3MM Package Included - 1 x 5 M Silver Steel Chain
